_comment: Baseline parity tolerances per module. Maximum allowed difference between Dart implementation and C++ Framework golden reference. Updated whenever parity is verified. Use tool/verify_parity.dart to regenerate.
_workflow: 4. If improvements: update baseline tolerances downward
5. If regressions: tolerances exceeded => fix the bug
_format: Each module records max absolute difference observed and counts of samples exceeding standard thresholds.

_categories.exact: Modules that achieve bit-exact 0 parity. Any drift = bug.
_categories.near_exact: Modules with <1e-9 drift, limited only by JSON %.10g rounding.
_categories.libm_ffi: Modules using libm transcendentals via FFI. Bit-exact with C++ on the same platform; residual <1e-10 is JSON rounding floor.
_categories.iterative: Multi-frame simulations where polynomial Bezier rounding accumulates.

math.easingSine.notes: Uses LibM.cosf via FFI. Max observed 5e-11 — at JSON %.10g rounding floor.

math.cardanoAlgorithmForBezier.notes: Uses LibM.sqrtf/cosf and LibM.acos/cbrt (double, matches C++). Max observed 2.4e-11.

math.matrixMultiply.notes: Float32List storage truncates each result. Bit-exact match.

math.matrixInverse.notes: Float32 cast at each binop. Max observed 2.8e-10.

math.directionToRadian.notes: Uses LibM.atan2f via FFI. Max observed 4.9e-10.

breath.sineWave.notes: Uses LibM.sinf via FFI. Max observed 5e-11 — at JSON %.10g rounding floor.

look.formula.notes: Pure arithmetic with Float32 casts. Max observed 1.5e-9 from JSON rounding.

expression.weightSamples.notes: Writes through float32 FFI model parameters — bit-exact.

motion.curves.notes: BezierEvaluate (linear-t) polynomial chain. Max observed 9.6e-4. Eliminating this would require Float32.cast throughout CubismMotion's Bezier evaluation; not done because animation perception is unaffected.

motionQueue.priorityTransition.notes: Priority motion transition with fade crossfade. Max observed 6.5e-5. Same root cause as motion.curves.

physics.300frame.notes: Pendulum simulation, 300 iterations. Max observed 1.9e-6 after libm FFI + C++ rotation bug replication. Down from 3.4e-5 (18x improvement).

pose.120frame.notes: Writes through float32 FFI model parts — bit-exact.
